content:
Hiii i just started after falling in love with the game designs :]
im a big fan of Pollux, and im aware his best teammate is Castor who i also enjoy the design of so that’s been working out
but im struggling for my other two slots…I really like Hameln but I haven’t really seen him mentioned so am i not able to put them on the same team :(( i’ve been doing it so far but can’t help but worry there’s zero synergy between them :(
If using Hameln cause I like him will end up okay who should I use as the 4th slot? I have Ramona right now but I am not sure if I should be saving for some upcoming banner;;
Thank youu!! 

<:takenotes:1357186646294138890>
